_comment: Analyst override decisions. Key = alert_id OR rule_id. Action: escalate | investigate | suppress | benign

AW-00009.reason: Scheduled Qualys scan — confirmed by vulnerability management team. Auto-suppress all scan completion alerts.

VULN-SCAN-COMPLETE.reason: Rule-level suppress: all vuln scan completions are handled by the VM team, not SOC triage.

AW-00005.reason: Confirmed Nessus scanner activity from internal subnet 10.10.1.0/24. Whitelisted scanner service account.
